title: Settings
subtitle: Manage your profile, organization, and team access.

profile.section_subtitle: Details visible to the rest of your team.

organization.section_subtitle: The workspace that owns your projects and catalogues.
organization.name: Name
organization.no_org_title: You're not in an organization yet
organization.no_org_hint: Create one to start building projects and catalogues.

members.section_subtitle: Invite teammates, edit their access, and revoke it when needed.
members.list_title: {count, plural, =0 {No members yet} one {# member} other {# members}}
members.invitations_hint: {count, plural, =0 {No invitations out right now} one {# invite awaiting acceptance} other {# invites awaiting acceptance}}.
members.remove_body: {name} will lose access to this organization immediately. Their work stays intact — you can re-invite them later.
members.access_denied_body: Ask an admin to grant you the members.view capability to see the team roster.

modules.members_description: Who else can sign in, invite new people, and change these permissions.
modules.catalogues_description: Raw materials, packaging, and any custom reference tables — scoped per catalogue.
modules.formulations_description: Build projects, save versions, approve spec sheets, run QC validations.
modules.audit_description: Read the org-wide trail of every write across catalogues, projects, spec sheets, trial batches, and QC validations.
modules.no_row_scopes: No catalogues exist yet — create one to scope access.
